title: Tableau Server Repository Governance Analytics
overview: Extracting governance insights, row-level security audits, and view access frequency directly from the Tableau Server PostgreSQL workgroup database.
challenge: BI leadership lacked visibility into user dashboard adoption, stale workbooks, and permission compliance.
solution: Authored automated SQL queries against the Tableau Server workgroup Postgres DB, publishing live admin governance dashboards.
archExplanation: Tableau Server PostgreSQL repository is queried via read-only credentials; aggregated views power executive governance dashboards.
impact: Validated 100% RLS compliance across enterprise security groups
learnings: Correlated subqueries on historical_events table require index hints
Always read from read-only standby nodes
